languagePicker.title: Language
languagePicker.subtitle: Sets the app and your interview language.

chooseMode.title:
What do you
want to do?
chooseMode.comingSoonBody: These modes need an employer invite. Once an employer invites you, they'll show up here ready to go.

mock.title: Mock interview
mock.sub: A full practice round, scored like the real thing.

real.title: Real interview
real.sub: Take a scheduled interview from an employer.

topic_practice.title: Topic practice
topic_practice.sub: Drill a specific skill with instant coaching.

capability_assessment.title: Capability assessment
capability_assessment.sub: Get evaluated by your employer on real skills.

expert_interview.title: Expert interview
expert_interview.sub: Interview an expert AI to extract know-how.
